title: stenogyne wilkesii
intro: Stenogyne wilkesii, also known as Wilkes' stenogyne or Kauai stenogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, native to Hawaii. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stenogyne wilkesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
